patterns: Full codebase audit required before documentation — 15 source files across 4 directories
Architecture diagram built from graph.ts edge definitions (7 nodes, 1 conditional branch)
A2A endpoint uses .invoke() (synchronous) while WebSocket uses .stream() (real-time) — important distinction for documentation
Memory system is dual-write: Firestore cold + Vertex RAG hot — both documented separately
Context Cache targets gemini-1.5-pro even though cognitive nodes use gemini-2.5-flash-lite — noted in docs
notes: README covers: architecture diagram, execution pipeline table, project structure, prerequisites, env config, setup & install, running, Web UI usage, A2A protocol with cURL examples, all 7 core component deep dives, Docker + Cloud Run deployment, token management, self-learning memory, and troubleshooting.
